narrative:
Precinct Coal Grove A (precinct in Lawrence County) has 305 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.2 percentage points.
